creator: rnmtw70@yandex.com
text:
Created attachment 177342
Proposed patch for science/hdf5/pkg-plist

During the install phase, make complains that the file /usr/ports/science/hdf5/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libhdf5_fortran.so.100.0.0 is missing. Searching came up with /usr/ports/science/hdf5/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libhdf5_fortran.so.100.0.1 instead, and changing the corresponding line in pkg-plist fixes the issue. Proposed patch attached, however I should point out that I haven't examined any closer whether this causes other problems elsewhere.
